24th May 2026:

- We will be posting daily war updates on the ongoing war in Middle East
- ⁠Follow us for daily Brief

● President Trump held constructive calls with key leaders from Saudi Arabia, Qatar, UAE, Egypt, and Turkey. He later claimed that a peace deal with Iran has been negotiated following the discussions.

● Iran’s Fars News Agency rejected Trump’s claim, denying that the Strait of Hormuz has returned to pre-conflict status.

● Iranian FM Araghchi held phone calls with his Saudi, Qatari, and Egyptian counterparts to coordinate diplomatic efforts aimed at ending the conflict.

● PM Netanyahu held a call with Trump. An MoU was reportedly agreed upon to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with both sides emphasizing that any final deal must fully dismantle Iran’s enrichment capabilities and remove all enriched material.

● Reports indicate the IRGC Aerospace Force used a UAE-based network, including companies in Ras Al Khaimah and Dubai’s Jebel Ali port, to secretly procure advanced Chinese satellite communication equipment for its drone and missile programs.

● The Liberia-flagged LNG tanker AL HAMRA successfully exited the Strait of Hormuz bound for western India.

● The IDF dismantled a ~100 m long Hezbollah underground tunnel in the Mount Dov area of southern Lebanon, which contained 4 hideout rooms.
